## Return Value

The result for the specified request which contains a list of updated [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDElement/Value] objects. Access the results using  [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/Result/get()].

For an example, see [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDDeviceClient/updateElements(_:timeout:)].

# subscript(_:)

**Instance Subscript**

Receive the result of a request element update.

## Declaration

```swift
subscript(originalRequest: HIDDeviceClient.RequestElementUpdate) -> Result<[HIDElement.Value], any Error>? { get }
```

## Parameters

- **originalRequest**: A request that was initially passed to [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDDeviceClient/updateElements(_:timeout:)].

## Return Value

The result for the specified request which contains a list of updated [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDElement/Value] objects. Access the results using  [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/Result/get()].

## Overview

For an example, see [doc://com.apple.CoreHID/documentation/CoreHID/HIDDeviceClient/updateElements(_:timeout:)].
